zh.lifeSummary: 當Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues於1056年出生在西班牙加利西亞時，她的父親Conde Rodrigo Muñoz41歲，母親Teresa36歲。她和Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues于1056年出生在西班牙加利西亞时，她的父亲Conde Rodrigo Muñoz41岁，母亲Teresa36岁。她和Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Rodrigues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Luis, Mario, Fernando, Alberto, Juan, Julio, Armando, Eduardo, Francisco.  Portuguese Joao, Agostinho, Paulo, Joaquim, Guilherme, Ilidio, Serafim, Vasco, Albano, Albeiro, Amadeu, Anabela.

Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name   Rodrigo  . This surname is also found in the cities of the west coast of India, having been taken there by Portuguese colonists. Compare   Rodrigue   2.
Spanish: variant or altered form of Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodriques
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Fernando, Francisco, Gilberto, Juan, Adriano, Agusto, Alfredo, Alicia.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo.
Altered form of Portuguese Rodrigues and probably also of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ). It is common in Brazil.

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Elena, Rafael, Alfonso, Alicia, Angel, Araceli, Benardo, Carlos, Carlota, Cristina, Emilio.  Indian Devi, Dileep, Dilip, Gamini, Mahendra, Manoj, Sunil, Tilak.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Rodrigo, from ancient Germanic Hrōdrīc, a compound of hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + rīc ‘power, kingdom’. Rodrigo is one of the most important Spanish personal names of ancient Germanic origin. It was borne by the last of the Visigoth kings and by a Christian saint, Saint Roderick, one of the 9th-century martyrs of Córdoba. This surname is also found in and around some of the former Portuguese territories of western India.

nameMeanings.name: Mayor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pedro, Agapito, Alberto, Cesar, Cosme, Javier, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Orlando.
Spanish: nickname for an older man or a distinguishing epithet for the elder of two bearers of the same personal name, from mayor ‘older’, from Latin maior (natus), literally ‘greater (by birth)’.

variants.name: Morgado
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Abilio, Acacio, Armando, Mario, Edmundo, Eduardo, Miguel, Adolfo, Alejandra.  Portuguese Henrique.
Portuguese and Spanish: distinguishing name for the eldest son of a family, from Portuguese morgado ‘first-born, heir’, Late Latin maioricatus, a derivative of maior (see Mayor 2).

variants.name: Mayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

en.lifeSummary: When Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues was born in 1056, in Galicia, Spain, her father, Conde Rodrigo Muñoz, was 41 and her mother, Teresa, was 36. She had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues est née en 1056, à Galicia, Espagne, son père, Conde Rodrigo Muñoz, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Teresa, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues 1056 in Galicia, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conde Rodrigo Muñoz 41 und ihre Mutter Teresa 36. Sie hatte mit Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues è nata il nel 1056 nel Galicia, Spagna, sua padre, Conde Rodrigo Muñoz, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Teresa, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara.

ja.lifeSummary: Mayor Gotrondo Rodriguesが1056年にスペインガリシアで生まれた時，父Conde Rodrigo Muñozは41歳，母Teresaは36歳であった。彼女はPedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámaraとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues(이)가 1056년 스페인 갈리샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conde Rodrigo Muñoz(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Teresa(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues nasceu em 1056, em Galicia, Espanha, seu pai, Conde Rodrigo Muñoz, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Teresa, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues родилась в 1056 г. в местности галися, Испания, её отцу по имени Conde Rodrigo Muñoz было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Teresa, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara.

sm.estimado entre 1085 e 1097: mai le e tusa o le 1085 e o'o I le 1097

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mayor Gotrondo Rodrigues nació en 1056, en Galicia, España, su papá, Conde Rodrigo Muñoz, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Teresa, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, de Trastámara.
